response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack and systems developer, but the role's hard requirements are largely unmet: there is no indication of native-level Japanese proficiency, no Linux kernel investigation or modification experience, and only brief C/C++ exposure (six months at National Instruments) versus the required strong C for UNIX. His background centers on web platforms, TypeScript/Node.js, and DLang rather than embedded LAN-switch firmware, networking protocols, or security technologies like MACsec and 802.1X.
strengths: Long, varied engineering career spanning web, mobile, desktop, and some embedded work
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (DLang, async I/O) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed — a hard requirement for this role
Minimal professional C experience and no Linux kernel source-modification background
No demonstrated L2/L3 networking, switch, or security-feature (MACsec, 802.1X) experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of C/UNIX and Linux kernel depth
